revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data First Syrian Republic]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = First Syrian Republic | shortname alias = Syria | flag alias = Flag of Syria (1932-1958; 1961-1963).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} <noinclude> | related1 = Syria | related2 = Second Syrian Republic | related3 = Mandate of Syria | related4 = Syrian Federation | related5 = State of Syria | related6 = State of Aleppo | related7 = State of Damascus | related8 = Alawite State | related9 = Jabal Druze State </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_First_Syrian_Republic here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
